summary: Full backend regression + iteration_2 feature tests for OutSide. 52/52 passed (100%). All new endpoints, COP currency, real Barranquilla seed data, items flags, lat/lng, registros-cancha public form, stats (horas/ingresos), CSV export (Bearer/cookie/query auth), and torneo categoria work correctly. Previously failing payment/status (Stripe upstream error) now returns 200 with cached tx info — fix verified.

minor.issue: Still ungated test backdoor — anyone in production can promote themselves to admin. Recommend ENABLE_DEV_SEED env flag and/or shared secret header. Flagged previously, still present.
No rate limiting on public form — vulnerable to spam abuse. Recommend captcha/IP rate-limit before going live.
email field uses plain str, no Pydantic EmailStr validation — invalid emails (e.g. 'foo') are accepted.
ingresos_potenciales includes ALL non-cancelled reservas (initiated/unpaid too), which may overstate revenue. Consider separating 'pending' vs 'confirmed'.

Accepts session token as URL query param ?auth=<token>. This is necessary for browser anchor-download, but tokens may leak via referer headers, browser history, and server access logs. Mitigation: use short-lived signed download URLs or a POST→redirect pattern.

action_items: Gate /api/auth/dev-seed behind ENABLE_DEV_SEED env flag for production.
Add EmailStr validation + basic rate limiting to /api/registros-cancha.
Consider splitting ingresos_potenciales into pending vs confirmed in /api/stats/ingresos.
Optional: switch CSV export ?auth= to short-lived signed URL or POST-based download to avoid token leakage.
Optional: server.py is now ~1160 lines — split into routers (auth, locales, canchas, reservas, descuentos, torneos, payments, stats, registros).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py grew from 924 → 1162 lines; should now be split into modular routers.
RegistroCanchaIn.email: str — should be EmailStr (pydantic[email]) to validate format.
Public POST /api/registros-cancha is completely unauthenticated and unrate-limited — DOS/spam risk. Add slowapi or similar.
CSV export accepts session_token in URL query (?auth=). Necessary for browser download but tokens leak via logs/referer/history. Mitigation: signed short-lived URL.
GET /api/stats/ingresos counts all non-cancelled reservas as 'potenciales' — initiated-but-unpaid reservas inflate this. Consider clearer state separation.
ReservaIn.fecha/hora still plain str without regex/validators (carry-over from iteration_1).
best_descuento still does not stack discounts or honor expiration dates (carry-over). Acceptable for MVP.
stats_horas aggregation does not filter expired/past dates — could conflate hot future hours with already-played ones. Consider {fecha: {$gte: today}} for forward-looking demand.
seed_data wipes locales/canchas/torneos on SEED_VERSION change but NOT reservas — orphan reservas (with old local_id/cancha_id) could remain. Not hit in tests but a real-world risk.
test_credentials: Admin: POST /api/auth/dev-seed {email: admin@outside.com}. Regular user: inserted directly into Mongo with TEST_ prefix; cleaned up in fixture teardown.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 5 real Barranquilla locales (La 8 FC, Goal FC, Mundial Soccer 5, Estadio Norte, Sintética del Norte) = 10 canchas + 4 torneos (Senior/Juvenil/Infantil/Mixto) under SEED_VERSION=v3-real-barranquilla. Tests verify counts and content. Additional TEST_-prefixed registros-cancha, descuentos, torneos and reservas created/cleaned per session.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration_2 backend changes verified end-to-end. Tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration2.py (new endpoints) and /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (regression). Both use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env, MONGO_URL+DB_NAME from /app/backend/.env. SEED_VERSION=v3-real-barranquilla; if seed is bumped, expected locale names/counts in TestSeed must be updated. Stripe currency is 'cop' and amounts are COP integer thousands (e.g., 120000). Test ran 100% green in 14.7s combined.
rca of the issue: No outstanding bugs. Previously-reported payment/status 500 is fixed by wrapping stripe_checkout.get_checkout_status in try/except and returning cached transaction info (server.py:760-771).
